description: Standardize file formatting and character encoding for the 'InternationalApp' project. This legacy project was created on Windows and requires two updates: convert the source file 'src/com/legacy/WindowsService.java' from Windows line endings (CRLF) to Unix line endings (LF), and change the project text encoding to UTF-8 to ensure the Japanese localization file 'src/messages_jp.properties' displays correctly. Save all changes when done.
